data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: Tautological condition in KEY selection: `KEY = LINUX_KEY if (platform == 'Linux' and True) else GENERIC_KEY`. The 'and True' is always True and should be removed: `KEY = LINUX_KEY if platform == 'Linux' else GENERIC_KEY`.
File: tests/scripts/benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh
Category: hygiene
data.title: benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh: tautological 'and True' in Linux platform key selection
